# StatCurve — per-level multipliers for stats (Levels 1–100)

# Format: LV=HP,ATK,DEF,SPA,SPD2,SPD,DEX  (multipliers, 1.00 = base)

# Design: gentle early growth, mid-game lift, late-game stronger; HP grows fastest.
